name: Slack Block Kit Bridge
description: Send interactive Slack Block Kit cards and handle button clicks. Use the `slack-blockkit-bridge.send-template` gateway method to send pre-built interactive cards (approval, task-progress, pick-one) to a Slack channel. Cards support button interactions that are automatically tracked and handled. Channel must be a Slack channel ID (e.g. C1234567890), not a channel name.

gatewayMethods.name: slack-blockkit-bridge.send-template
gatewayMethods.description: Send a pre-built interactive card to a Slack channel. This is the recommended method — prefer it over send unless you need custom Block Kit layout.

kind.description: Card template type. approval = approve/reject buttons. task-progress = start/done buttons. pick-one = custom option buttons (requires options).

channel.description: Slack channel ID (e.g. C1234567890). Must be a channel ID, not a name.

title.description: Main question or heading shown on the card.

body.description: Optional supporting text shown below the title.

threadTs.description: Optional. Post as a reply in this thread (Slack message timestamp).

options.description: Required for pick-one. Optional override for approval/task-progress. Each item: { value: string, label: string, style?: 'primary'|'danger' }. Minimum 2 items for pick-one.

sessionKey.description: Optional. Identifier for correlating this card with a session or task.

metadata.description: Optional. Arbitrary key-value data to store with the card.

postActionRenderMode.description: Optional. How the card looks after a button is clicked. replace (default): card becomes a handled confirmation. preserve: original card stays visible with the chosen option marked and a result appended.

params.title: 是否现在发布？
params.body: 确认后将立即触发发布流程。

params.title: 现在开始做 TodayMode 吗？

gatewayMethods.name: slack-blockkit-bridge.send
gatewayMethods.description: Send a custom Block Kit card. Use this only when send-template doesn't fit. IMPORTANT: all interactive button action_ids must start with 'wbk:' (e.g. 'wbk:review:approve'). You must also pass a matching 'actions' array to register the action labels.

blocks.description: Slack Block Kit blocks array. Interactive buttons must use action_id starting with 'wbk:' (e.g. 'wbk:review:approve').

actions.description: Required when blocks contain interactive buttons. Maps each wbk: action_id to a human-readable name. Each item: { actionId: string, actionName: string }.

threadTs.description: Optional thread timestamp to reply into.

gatewayMethods.name: slack-blockkit-bridge.update
gatewayMethods.description: Update an existing card by cardId. Used to manually change card content or state after it was sent.

cardId.description: The cardId returned when the card was sent (format: card_{timestamp}_{hex}).

text.description: New fallback text. Required if blocks is omitted.

blocks.description: New Block Kit blocks. Required if text is omitted.

statePatch.description: Optional. Partial CardState to merge: { status, handledActionLabel, handledAt, ... }

metadataPatch.description: Optional. Key-value pairs to merge into card metadata.
